headline: Why Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Is Seeing Its Investment Story And Fair Value Estimates Shift
summary: Ulta Beauty's analyst derived fair value estimate has shifted from about US$674.58 to roughly US$684.38 per share, giving investors a fresh reference point for where models currently sit. Behind that change, several research houses have been revisiting their assumptions, updating ratings and price targets as they weigh Ulta's specialty beauty positioning, recent top line inputs, and consumer demand signals. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape the way you track...
